info.title: Kindred Platform API
info.description: Backend REST API for Kindred — India's Volunteer Platform. Supports Users, Organizations, Volunteers, Programs, Requests, Tasks, Hour Logs, Resource Donations, Program Assignments, Program Applications, and Subtasks. Role-based access control via the "role" header.
